overall.description: Static cinematic shot from a video game showing a cyberpunk industrial waterfront scene. The view captures murky green water in the foreground, a floating shanty settlement along the right shore, a prominent red truss bridge spanning the water, and a dense futuristic skyline with active industrial smokestacks under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront with floating shanty settlement

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from a fixed vantage point overlooking the water

entered.detail: red metal bridge structure spanning horizontally across the water
multiple tall smokestacks emitting white smoke into the sky above the city
cluster of colorful makeshift structures and boats floating along the right shoreline
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with varied heights and architectural designs
greenish-brown water filling the foreground with gentle ripples

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a cyberpunk industrial waterfront under clear midday skies. The murky green water fills the foreground, bordered by a floating shanty village on the right shore. A prominent red truss bridge spans the middle distance, while industrial smokestacks and towering futuristic skyscrapers dominate the background skyline. No camera movement or significant action occurs throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic perspective of a cyberpunk industrial waterfront under the glare of a clear midday sun. It begins with a wide view of murky green water filling the foreground, bordered by a floating shanty village along the right shore. The gaze extends across the middle distance to a prominent red truss bridge that anchors the composition. Finally, the scene opens up to reveal a dense background skyline where industrial smokestacks and towering futuristic skyscrapers dominate the horizon.
